'''''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 17''' is the seventeenth issue of [[Star Wars Insider|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'']], later rebranded as the ''Star Wars Insider''. Issue 17 was published in Summer [[1992]].

==Contents==
===Features===
*"George Lucas: The Future of the Force"
*"Star Wars Young Readers Series: A New Generation of Fans Discover The Force"
*"Uncovering the History Behind Young Indy"
*"Super Star Wars: Space Combat Simulator"
